title: Socotranthus socotranus
taxonomy: Socotranthus socotranus is classified as a species of sea anemone within the family Actiniidae. It belongs to the phylum Cnidaria, class Anthozoa, order Actiniaria, and family Actiniidae. Further classification includes the genus Socotranthus. The Socotranthus socotranus is also known as a marine animal. This classification helps to understand its evolutionary history and relationships with other sea anemones.
